remaining_tasks.name: Better Auth wiring (route + schema + signup hook + smoke test)
Vercel Dashboard: deployment protection toggle + bypass token
Final phase verification (Sentry alert, Lighthouse, axe in CI)

blockers.description: Sentry account/project not created — required for T-26/T-27/T-34 (P1 alert verification per success criterion #3)
blockers.workaround: Code can be written; verification deferred until DSN + auth token in Vercel ENV

blockers.description: Resend API key not in Vercel ENV — RESEND_API_KEY currently absent from cloud
blockers.workaround: env.ts has it as REQUIRED via z.string().startsWith('re_'); placeholder in .env.local lets local code parse

blockers.description: Upstash Redis URL+TOKEN not in Vercel ENV — ratelimit fallback to NOOP (acceptable for Phase 0 per RESEARCH.md)
blockers.workaround: ratelimit.ts has NOOP_LIMIT fallback; Phase 1+ will tighten env.ts

blockers.description: Vercel project lacks connected Git repo — preview env vars cannot be added until GH repo connection (T-30)
blockers.workaround: BETTER_AUTH_{SECRET,URL} set for production+development only; preview will be added after GH connect

blockers.description: tests/e2e/landing.spec.ts cookie-banner test SKIPPED — vanilla-cookieconsent v3 only auto-shows when >=1 category is non-readOnly; Phase 0 ships only readOnly necessary
blockers.workaround: Banner CODE wired correctly; test re-enabled in Phase 1+ when first opt-in category lands

decisions.decision: Drizzle pulled forward from T-13 to Wave 0 T-09
decisions.rationale: tests/setup/pg-container.ts imports drizzle-orm; without it, Wave 0 tsc gate fails

decisions.decision: tests/e2e/** excluded from react-hooks/rules-of-hooks ESLint rule
decisions.rationale: Playwright fixture's `use` parameter is misidentified as a React hook (false positive)

decisions.decision: Vitest poolOptions removed (Vitest 4 typedefs reject top-level placement; singleFork=false is default)
decisions.rationale: Vitest 4 deprecation; behavior preserved via default

decisions.decision: Cookie banner e2e test marked test.skip with documented reason
decisions.rationale: vanilla-cookieconsent v3 only shows banner when >=1 category is non-readOnly; Phase 0 ships only readOnly necessary by design

decisions.decision: Cloud setup automated via Vercel MCP (vercel:bootstrap skill) instead of manual UI flow
decisions.rationale: User chose MCP-automated path; cuts Wave 1a from ~30min manual to ~5min for Sentry/Resend/Upstash + automated Vercel/Neon/Blob

decisions.decision: BETTER_AUTH_URL set to https://cultural-layer-recklinghausen.vercel.app for production (preview deferred until GH connection)
decisions.rationale: Vercel project URL pattern; will be domain-bound in Phase 6

next_action: Resume with T-25 (Better Auth wiring) — code-only task; install better-auth, write src/lib/auth.ts + auth-client.ts, src/db/auth-schema.ts, src/app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts, tests/integration/better-auth-smoke.test.ts. Cloud-side T-25 also needs RESEND_API_KEY in Vercel ENV (use placeholder if Resend not yet registered).
context_notes: Cloud foundation is real and live: Neon DB has 10 tables migrated, Blob store linked, all Vercel env vars (DATABASE_URL, BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN, BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, BETTER_AUTH_URL) injected for production+development. .env.local pulled, gitignored, contains real secrets — never commit. Phase 0 success criteria #2 (10-table schema in Neon with CHECKs + indexes) IS NOW SATISFIED. Phase 0 success criterion #1 (CI gate + manual prod promote) requires GitHub connection (T-30) + Vercel Deployment Protection toggle (T-29). Phase 0 success criterion #3 (Sentry P1 alerts) requires user to set up Sentry. Phase 0 success criterion #4 (audit() helper unit-tested on testcontainers) IS NOW SATISFIED.
